name: Business Brain Showa-Ota Inc.
summary: Business Brain Showa-Ota Inc. provides system development and IT solutions in Japan. The company offers consulting, work restructuring, system development, system integration and sustainment services. It also provides managed services based on specialized human resources, such as certified accountants, certified tax accountants, social insurance consultants, and SEs; and BPO solutions in the field of accounting, finance, HR, payroll, labor, and IT. Business Brain Showa-Ota Inc. was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
